title: OCS/GCS qconf checkpointing environment schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -sckpt / -Mckpt: a checkpointing interface definition.

ckpt_command.description: Command to initiate a checkpoint, or the empty string for NONE.

migr_command.description: Command to migrate a job, or the empty string for NONE.

restart_command.description: Command to restart a checkpointed job, or the empty string for NONE.

clean_command.description: Command to clean up after a checkpointed job, or the empty string for NONE.

ckpt_dir.description: Directory to which checkpoints are written.

signal.description: Signal sent to initiate a checkpoint, or the empty string for NONE.

when.description: When checkpoints are generated, a combination of the letters s, m, x, r.
